name: io.github.PascaleBeier/hitkeep
title: HitKeep
description: Read-only MCP server for aggregate HitKeep analytics and official documentation.

hitkeep_host.description: Hostname of your HitKeep leader or proxy, without the scheme, for example analytics.example.com.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer token from a scoped HitKeep personal or team API client.
